name: small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual processing causes late payments. We streamline manual invoice tracking instead of manual invoice processing.
problem_solved: manual processing of vendor invoices leads to late payments
